app.name: Pay Guard
app.description: Helps people in the Czech Republic decide where to send limited funds when obligations exceed available money.

toast.cloudHistoryProOnly: Cloud history is available on Pro only

errors.title: Something went wrong
errors.description: The app failed to load. Try refreshing the page.
errors.notFoundHint: This link does not exist or has moved.

chat.welcome:
Hi! I'm Pay Guard — your payment prioritization assistant for the Czech Republic.

Tell me about your situation. You can type or use the microphone. Amounts can be in CZK, EUR, or other currencies — I'll convert everything to Czech koruna.
chat.subtitle: Conversation with Pay Guard
chat.voiceUnsupported: Voice is not supported in this browser
chat.recommendationReady: I have enough info — ready to recommend.
chat.saveConsultationError: Could not save consultation. Try again.
chat.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
chat.authError: Please sign in to use chat.
chat.rateLimitError: Too many requests — try again in a moment.
chat.serviceUnavailableError: AI service is temporarily unavailable. Try again later.
chat.offlineError: You are offline. AI chat requires internet — your last recommendation is available offline.
chat.emptySubtitle: I'll help you prioritize payments. Type or speak — I'll ask about debts, income, and available funds.
chat.voiceHint: Or use the microphone for voice input
suggestions: I have trouble with rent and utilities
I don't know what to pay first

consent.title: AI chat data processing
consent.description: Pay Guard uses xAI (Grok) for conversational advice. Your messages and financial details (income, debts, amounts) will be sent to xAI servers outside the EU to generate replies.
consent.details: Chat advice is not legal or tax advice. You can withdraw consent by signing out. Optional debt notes are not sent to the AI.
consent.accept: I agree and want to continue

pro.offlineHint: Cloud sync requires an internet connection.
pro.sessionFailed: Could not save consultation to cloud

consultations.title: My consultations
consultations.subtitle: Previous chats and payment recommendations
consultations.empty: You don't have any saved consultations yet.
consultations.proCloudHint: Pro syncs consultations across devices. Sessions marked Cloud are backed up to your account.
consultations.emptyHint: Start a chat with Pay Guard — your conversations and recommendations will appear here.
consultations.loadErrorHint: Check your connection and try again. Local consultations may still be available after refresh.
consultations.loadError: Could not load conversations. Please try again.

recommendation.title: Payment recommendations
recommendation.pdfFailed: Could not generate PDF. Please try again.
recommendation.pdfProOnly: PDF export is a Pro feature. Upgrade to download professional reports.
recommendation.pdfMissing: This consultation has no saved recommendation

pricing.title: Pricing

pro.name: Pro
pro.cancelled: Checkout was cancelled. You can return anytime.
pro.processing: Payment is processing — this may take a few seconds…
pro.syncFailed: Could not activate Pro. Please try again.

pricing.loginToUpgrade: Sign in to upgrade to Pro
pricing.billingNotConfigured: Pro checkout is not available yet.
pricing.billingIssueMissingSecret: Stripe secret key is missing — set STRIPE_SECRET_KEY in .env.local.
pricing.billingIssuePlaceholderSecret: Replace the Stripe secret key placeholder with your sk_test_ or sk_live_ key.
pricing.billingIssueInvalidSecret: STRIPE_SECRET_KEY must start with sk_test_ or sk_live_.
pricing.billingIssueMissingPrice: Stripe price is missing — set STRIPE_PRO_PRICE_ID (price_…).
pricing.billingIssuePlaceholderPrice: Replace STRIPE_PRO_PRICE_ID placeholder with your monthly Price id.
pricing.billingIssueProductNotPrice: STRIPE_PRO_PRICE_ID must be a Price id (price_…), not a Product id (prod_…).
pricing.billingIssueMissingWebhook: Webhook secret missing — payment may succeed but Pro won't activate until STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET is set.

billing.title: Subscription
billing.proDescription: Conversation history, PDF export, and cloud sync.
billing.loginHint: Sign in to manage your plan.

footer.disclaimer: Pay Guard does not replace a financial or legal advisor. Recommendations are indicative.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to continue your Pay Guard consultation
auth.emailCodeHint: Existing accounts only. Register first via the Password tab.
auth.emailCodeSent: We sent a code to your email. Enter it below.
auth.emailCodeDevHint: Codes work only for registered emails. Create an account on the Password tab first (e.g. Password1).
auth.passwordRequirementsHint: At least 8 characters with upper, lower case and a digit (e.g. Password1).
auth.confirmEmail: Confirm your email using the link we sent.
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: We'll email you a link to set a new password
auth.forgotPasswordSent: If an account exists, we sent a reset link to your email.
auth.resetPasswordSubtitle: Choose a new password for your account

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: Cannot reach the server. Run npm run dev and check your connection.
errors.weakPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.passwordRequirements: Password needs 8+ chars with upper, lower case and a digit (e.g. Password1).
errors.accountNotFound: No account for this email. Register first on the Password tab.
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Email not confirmed. Check your inbox or disable Confirm email in Supabase.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again in a few minutes.
errors.supabaseEmailRateLimited: Supabase temporarily blocks sending emails (testing limit). Use the Password tab with e.g. Password1, or wait about an hour. In Supabase: Authentication → Rate Limits.
errors.pkceHint: The email link doesn't work in this browser. Use the "Email code" tab and enter the 6-digit code, or sign in with password.

offline.title: You are offline
offline.subtitle: You are offline, but your latest data is still available.
offline.bannerSubtitle: View your last recommendations and conversation without a connection.
offline.noRecommendation: No saved recommendation yet. Get a new one when you are back online.
offline.fallbackBody: Open the installed Pay Guard app for your last recommendation.

install.bannerBody: Add the app to your home screen for quick access and offline data.
install.iosBannerBody: Add Pay Guard to your home screen — offline data stays available.
install.iosStepsSubtitle: Pay Guard works like a native app in Safari.
install.iosStep2: Scroll down and tap "Add to Home Screen"

settings.title: App settings
settings.subtitle: PWA, offline mode, and installation
settings.installBody: Install Pay Guard as an app for faster access and a better offline experience.
settings.iosInstructions: In Safari, tap Share (□↑) and choose “Add to Home Screen”.
settings.installedMessage: Pay Guard is installed on your device.
settings.offlineBody: Your last recommendation and conversation are stored locally for offline viewing.
settings.aboutBody: Pay Guard is a Progressive Web App (PWA). It works in the browser and when installed on your home screen.

pro.metaDescription: Financial dashboard — cash flow, debts, and monthly forecast.
pro.subtitle: Financial control panel

upgrade.bannerDescription: Unlock debt catalog, cloud sync, consultations history, and financial forecasts.
upgrade.lockedHint: Pro features are preview-only on the Free plan.
upgrade.mutationBlocked: Pro subscription required for this action.

errorBoundary.title: Pro workspace error
errorBoundary.description: Something went wrong while loading Pay Guard Pro. You can return to chat or reload the page.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Your Pro command center — cash flow, 3-month forecast, and payment priorities.
dashboard.metricsDescription: Available funds, cash flow, debt priorities, and 3-month balance.
dashboard.criticalDebtsDescription: Execution risk or overdue essential obligations.
dashboard.noCriticalDebtsHint: Critical items appear when deadlines are imminent.
dashboard.emptyProfileDescription: Add debts, incomes, or expenses to unlock insights and forecasts.
dashboard.cashFlowDescription: Monthly equivalent from recurring incomes and expenses, minus minimum debt payments.
dashboard.snapshotDescription: From your most recent financial session.
dashboard.urgentDebtsDescription: Priority levels 0–1 — due soon or critical.
dashboard.noUrgentDebtsHint: Add debts to see prioritization here.
dashboard.upgradeDescription: Cloud profile, history, and advanced analysis require Pro.
dashboard.errorGeneric: Something went wrong while loading your data.
dashboard.engineInsightDescription: Priority Engine uses recurring cash flow, income stability, and short-term forecast.
dashboard.engineNoRecommendations: Add debts to see payment recommendations.
dashboard.healthCritical: {count, plural, one {# critical debt needs immediate attention} other {# critical debts need immediate attention}}
dashboard.healthDeficit: Monthly cash flow is negative (−{amount}) — review expenses and priorities.
dashboard.healthHealthy: Cash flow looks stable — keep monitoring your forecast.
dashboard.forecastSummaryDescription: Projected balance after recurring income, expenses, and minimum debt payments.
dashboard.forecastDeficitWarning: Projected deficit by {month} — adjust income or expenses.
dashboard.conclusionProjectedDeficit: Your balance may fall to {amount} in {month}. Review expenses and prioritize critical debts before then.
dashboard.conclusionMonthlyDeficit: Monthly spending exceeds income by {amount}. Trim recurring expenses or add income before taking on new obligations.
dashboard.conclusionStable: Your outlook is stable — projected balance {amount} by {month}. Keep tracking recurring income and expenses.
dashboard.gettingStartedStep3: Add debts to unlock Priority Engine recommendations.
dashboard.forecastEmptyDescription: Add recurring data to see a 3-month projection.
dashboard.forecastEmptyHint: Forecast uses the same cash flow as Dashboard and Priority Engine — changes sync instantly.
dashboard.engineNoDebtsDescription: Add debts to get payment recommendations based on your recurring cash flow.
dashboard.profileSettingsDescription: Available funds and income stability feed Dashboard, Forecast, and Priority Engine.

debts.title: Debts
debts.subtitle: Manage your obligations and payment priorities.
debts.formDescription: Enter creditor details and amount in CZK.
debts.emptyDescription: Add debts to get payment recommendations and track due dates.
debts.errorGeneric: Something went wrong while loading your debts.

incomes.title: Recurring incomes
incomes.subtitle: Salary, freelance, rental — tracked for cash flow forecast.
incomes.formDescription: Source, category, amount, frequency, and next payment date.
incomes.projectionDescription: Expected receipts based on frequency and next payment dates.
incomes.emptyDescription: Add income sources to improve cash flow forecasting.
incomes.errorGeneric: Something went wrong while loading your incomes.

expenses.title: Recurring expenses
expenses.subtitle: Housing, utilities, food — grouped for forecast and budgeting.
expenses.formDescription: Name, category, amount, frequency, and next payment date.
expenses.name: Name
expenses.emptyDescription: Track regular expenses for a clearer monthly forecast.
expenses.errorGeneric: Something went wrong while loading your expenses.

forecast.title: Cash flow forecast
forecast.subtitle: 3-month projection based on recurring income, expenses, and debt payments.
forecast.emptyDescription: Add debts, incomes, or expenses to generate a forecast.
forecast.emptyStep1: Add debts with due dates and minimum payments
forecast.breakdownDescription: Recurring inflows, outflows, and minimum debt payments.
forecast.chartDescription: Estimated balance at the end of each month.
forecast.chartLegend: Bar height shows projected end-of-month balance.
forecast.chartDeficitHint: Red bars indicate a projected deficit.
forecast.tableDescription: Month-by-month income, expenses, debt payments, and balance.
forecast.visualSectionDescription: Chart, month cards, and recurring cash flow breakdown.
forecast.recommendationsDescription: Actions based on your forecast and debt priorities.
forecast.noRecommendations: Your cash flow looks stable for the next 3 months.
forecast.recMonthlyDeficit: Monthly outflows exceed inflows by {amount}. Review expenses or increase income.
forecast.recProjectedDeficit: A deficit of {amount} is expected in {month}. Plan extra savings or reduce payments.
forecast.recCriticalDebts: {count, plural, one {# critical debt requires immediate attention.} other {# critical debts require immediate attention.}}
forecast.recUrgentDebts: {count, plural, one {# urgent debt is due soon.} other {# urgent debts are due soon.}}
forecast.recStableOutlook: Your 3-month outlook looks stable — keep tracking recurring income and expenses.
forecast.debtsDescription: Critical and urgent obligations affecting your cash flow.
forecast.debtsEmptyHint: Add debts with due dates to see priorities here.
forecast.errorGeneric: Something went wrong while loading data.
forecast.refreshingData: Updating forecast from your latest data…
forecast.forecastDeficitWarning: Projected deficit by {month} — adjust income or expenses.
forecast.conclusionProjectedDeficit: Your balance may fall to {amount} in {month}. Review expenses and prioritize critical debts before then.
forecast.conclusionMonthlyDeficit: Monthly spending exceeds income by {amount}. Trim recurring expenses or add income before taking on new obligations.
forecast.conclusionStable: Your outlook is stable — projected balance {amount} by {month}. Keep tracking recurring income and expenses.
